questions.question: 1. Which of these is a type of Ferrous Metallic Mineral? / इनमें से कौन सा एक प्रकार का लौह धात्विक खनिज है?
questions.explanation: Iron ore is a ferrous mineral, meaning it contains iron.

questions.question: 2. Which of these is a Non-Ferrous Metallic Mineral? / इनमें से कौन सा एक अलौह धात्विक खनिज है?
options: Manganese / मैंगनीज (Note: Often grouped with ferrous but data lists it separately from Iron)
questions.explanation: Non-ferrous minerals, like copper, do not contain iron.

questions.question: 3. Coal is an example of which type of mineral? / कोयला किस प्रकार के खनिज का उदाहरण है?
options: Ferrous Metallic Mineral / लौह धात्विक खनिज
Non-Ferrous Metallic Mineral / अलौह धात्विक खनिज
Other Non-Metallic Mineral / अन्य अधात्विक खनिज
questions.explanation: Coal, petroleum, and natural gas are fuel minerals.

questions.question: 4. The Vindhya range is primarily known for which type of minerals? / विंध्य श्रृंखला मुख्य रूप से किस प्रकार के खनिजों के लिए जानी जाती है?
questions.explanation: The notes specify that the Vindhya range is known for non-metallic minerals.

questions.question: 5. The Dharwar and Cuddapah ranges are famous for which minerals? / धारवाड़ और कुडप्पा श्रृंखला किन खनिजों के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं?
options: Gold and Iron / सोना और लोहा
Coal and Bauxite / कोयला और बॉक्साइट
Mica and Copper / अभ्रक और तांबा
Diamond and Lithium / हीरा और लिथियम
questions.explanation: These ranges, particularly Cuddapah in AP, are noted for gold and iron deposits.

questions.question: 6. The Chhota Nagpur plateau (Gondwana land) is famous for... / छोटा नागपुर का पठार (गोंडवाना भूमि) ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध है।
questions.explanation: This region is India's mineral heartland, especially rich in Gondwana coal.

questions.question: 7. Which iron ore has the highest percentage of iron (approx. 70%)? / किस लौह अयस्क में लोहे का प्रतिशत सर्वाधिक (लगभग 70%) होता है?
questions.explanation: Magnetite is the finest iron ore with the highest iron content.

questions.question: 8. Which country has the world's highest reserves of iron ore? / विश्व में लौह अयस्क का सर्वाधिक भंडार किस देश में है?
questions.explanation: Australia leads the world in iron ore reserves.

questions.question: 9. Which Indian state has the highest reserves of iron ore? / किस भारतीय राज्य में लौह अयस्क का सर्वाधिक भंडार है?
questions.explanation: Odisha has the highest reserves and is also the largest producer of iron ore in India.

questions.question: 10. Which state is the largest producer of iron ore in India? / भारत में लौह अयस्क का सबसे बड़ा उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Odisha leads in both iron ore reserves and production.

questions.question: 11. The Bailadila mine in Chhattisgarh is famous for... / छत्तीसगढ़ में बैलाडीला खदान ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध है।
questions.explanation: Bailadila is one of India's most significant iron ore mines.

questions.question: 12. Singhbhum, Goa, and Noamundi are famous iron ore regions in... / सिंहभूम, गोवा और नोआमुंडी ... के प्रसिद्ध लौह अयस्क क्षेत्र हैं।
questions.explanation: These mines are located in the Singhbhum district of Jharkhand.

questions.question: 13. The Kudremukh iron ore mines are located in which state? / कुद्रेमुख लौह अयस्क खदानें किस राज्य में स्थित हैं?
questions.explanation: Kudremukh, in the Shivamogga district, is a major iron ore mining area in Karnataka.

questions.question: 14. Shivamogga district in Karnataka is famous for... / कर्नाटक का शिवमोगा जिला ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध है।
questions.explanation: Shivamogga district, including Kudremukh, is well-known for its iron ore deposits.

questions.question: 15. The Durg-Bastar-Chandrapur belt spans which two states? / दुर्ग-बस्तर-चंद्रपुर बेल्ट किन दो राज्यों में फैली हुई है?
options: MP & Gujarat / मध्य प्रदेश और गुजरात
questions.explanation: This is a major iron ore belt connecting Chhattisgarh and Maharashtra.

questions.question: 16. Which country has the world's highest reserves of Manganese (Mn)? / मैंगनीज (Mn) के विश्व में सर्वाधिक भंडार किस देश में हैं?
questions.explanation: South Africa holds the largest manganese reserves globally.

questions.question: 17. Which Indian state has the highest reserves of Manganese? / किस भारतीय राज्य में मैंगनीज का सर्वाधिक भंडार है?
questions.explanation: Odisha leads in reserves for manganese, similar to iron ore and bauxite.

questions.question: 18. Sundargarh, Kanjhar, and Koraput in Odisha are known for... / ओडिशा में सुंदरगढ़, क्योंझर और कोरापुट ... के लिए जाने जाते हैं।
questions.explanation: These districts are key regions for manganese mining in Odisha.

questions.question: 19. Bellari, Chikkamangulu, and Chitradurga are manganese-producing regions in... / बेल्लारी, चिक्कमंगलुरु और चित्रदुर्ग ... में मैंगनीज उत्पादक क्षेत्र हैं।
questions.explanation: These districts are part of the manganese-producing belt in Karnataka.

questions.question: 20. Bauxite is the primary ore of which metal? / बॉक्साइट किस धातु का प्राथमिक अयस्क है?
questions.explanation: Aluminium is extracted from bauxite ore.

questions.question: 21. Which country leads the world in Bauxite reserves? / बॉक्साइट भंडार में विश्व में कौन सा देश अग्रणी है?
questions.explanation: As with iron ore, Australia also has the world's largest bauxite reserves.

questions.question: 22. Which Indian state holds the largest reserves of Bauxite? / भारत के किस राज्य में बॉक्साइट का सबसे बड़ा भंडार है?
questions.explanation: Odisha has the largest bauxite reserves, particularly in the Panchpatmali deposits.

questions.question: 23. Lohardaga, Palamau, and Ranchi in Jharkhand are famous for... / झारखंड में लोहरदगा, पलामू और रांची ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं।
questions.explanation: These districts in Jharkhand are known for their bauxite deposits.

questions.question: 24. Bhavnagar and Junagarh are bauxite-producing regions in... / भावनगर और जूनागढ़ ... में बॉक्साइट उत्पादक क्षेत्र हैं।
questions.explanation: These coastal districts in Gujarat have significant bauxite deposits.

questions.question: 25. Balaghat and Katni in Madhya Pradesh are known for... / मध्य प्रदेश में बालाघाट और कटनी ... के लिए जाने जाते हैं।
questions.explanation: These districts in MP are noted for their bauxite deposits.

questions.question: 26. Where is the headquarters of NALCO (National Aluminium Company) located? / NALCO (नेशनल एल्युमीनियम कंपनी) का मुख्यालय कहाँ स्थित है?
questions.explanation: NALCO, a major aluminium producer, is headquartered in Bhubaneswar.

questions.question: 27. Who founded the 'Steel City' of Jamshedpur? / जमशेदपुर 'स्टील सिटी' की स्थापना किसने की?
questions.explanation: Jamshedpur, also known as Tatanagar, was founded by Jamshedji Tata.

questions.question: 28. Which state is the largest producer of Copper in India? / भारत में तांबे का सबसे बड़ा उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Madhya Pradesh, particularly the Balaghat mines, leads copper production.

questions.question: 29. The Balaghat mines in Madhya Pradesh are famous for... / मध्य प्रदेश की बालाघाट खदानें ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं।
questions.explanation: Balaghat is the largest copper-producing district in India.

questions.question: 30. The Malajkhand mines in MP are a well-known... / मध्य प्रदेश में मलाजखंड खदानें एक प्रसिद्ध... हैं।
options: Open pit copper mine / ओपन-पिट तांबा खदान
Underground gold mine / भूमिगत सोने की खदान
Iron ore mine / लौह अयस्क खदान
questions.explanation: Malajkhand is a major open-pit copper mine located in Balaghat.

questions.question: 31. Which country is the top producer of Mica in the world? / विश्व में अभ्रक (Mica) का शीर्ष उत्पादक देश कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: India is the world's leading producer of sheet mica.

questions.question: 32. Which state is the top producer of Mica in India? / भारत में अभ्रक (Mica) का शीर्ष उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Andhra Pradesh leads in mica production in India.

questions.question: 33. The Koderma-Gaya-Hazaribagh belt is famous for... / कोडरमा-गया-हजारीबाग बेल्ट ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध है।
questions.explanation: This belt, located in the Chhota Nagpur plateau, is a major mica-producing region.

questions.question: 34. The Kolar Gold Fields (KGF) are located in which state? / कोलार गोल्ड फील्ड्स (KGF) किस राज्य में स्थित हैं?
questions.explanation: KGF is one of the most famous, though now largely defunct, gold mines in Karnataka.

questions.question: 35. The Hutti Gold Mines are located in which state? / हुट्टी सोने की खदानें किस राज्य में स्थित हैं?
questions.explanation: Hutti mines are another significant gold-producing region in Karnataka.

questions.question: 36. The Ramgiri mines in Andhra Pradesh are known for... / आंध्र प्रदेश में रामगिरि खदानें ... के लिए जानी जाती हैं।
questions.explanation: Ramgiri mines are a notable gold deposit area in Andhra Pradesh.

questions.question: 37. Which is the only diamond-producing state in India? / भारत का एकमात्र हीरा उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Panna district in MP is the only region with active diamond mining in India.

questions.question: 38. The Panna mines are famous for which mineral? / पन्ना खदानें किस खनिज के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं?
questions.explanation: Panna is synonymous with diamond mining in India.

questions.question: 39. Which mineral is also known as 'White Gold'? / किस खनिज को 'सफेद सोना' (White Gold) भी कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Lithium is often called 'white gold' due to its value in battery production.

questions.question: 40. Which country has the largest reserves of Lithium? / लिथियम का सबसे बड़ा भंडार किस देश में है?
questions.explanation: Chile, part of the "Lithium Triangle," has the world's largest reserves.

questions.question: 41. Which country is the largest producer of Lithium? / लिथियम का सबसे बड़ा उत्पादक देश कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: While Chile has the most reserves, Australia is the top producer.

questions.question: 42. Which mineral is commonly known as 'Black Gold'? / किस खनिज को आमतौर पर 'काला सोना' (Black Gold) कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Coal is called Black Gold because of its high value as a fuel source.

questions.question: 43. Which type of coal has the highest carbon content (80-90%)? / किस प्रकार के कोयले में कार्बन की मात्रा (80-90%) सबसे अधिक होती है?
questions.explanation: Anthracite is the highest quality coal due to its high carbon and low moisture content.

questions.question: 44. Which type of coal is most commonly found in India? / भारत में कौन सा प्रकार का कोयला सबसे अधिक पाया जाता है?
questions.explanation: Bituminous coal is the most widespread and used type in India, especially in the Gondwana fields.

questions.question: 45. Which type of coal is also known as 'Brown Coal'? / किस प्रकार के कोयले को 'भूरा कोयला' (Brown Coal) भी कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Lignite is a lower-grade coal with high moisture, often called brown coal.

questions.question: 46. Which type of coal has the lowest carbon content (less than 40%)? / किस प्रकार के कोयले में कार्बन की मात्रा सबसे कम (40% से कम) होती है?
questions.explanation: Peat is the first stage of coal formation and has low carbon and high moisture.

questions.question: 47. Which country has the largest coal reserves in the world? / विश्व में कोयले का सबसे बड़ा भंडार किस देश के पास है?
questions.explanation: The United States holds the largest recoverable coal reserves.

questions.question: 48. Which Indian state has the largest reserves of coal? / किस भारतीय राज्य में कोयले का सबसे बड़ा भंडार है?
questions.explanation: Odisha has surpassed Jharkhand to hold the largest coal reserves in India.

questions.question: 49. Which state is the largest producer of coal in India? / भारत में कोयले का सबसे बड़ा उत्पादक राज्य कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Chhattisgarh is the leading state in terms of coal production.

questions.question: 50. Jharia, Bokaro, and Giridih are famous coal fields in... / झरिया, बोकारो और गिरिडीह ... में प्रसिद्ध कोयला क्षेत्र हैं।
questions.explanation: These are some of the largest and most important coalfields located in Jharkhand.

questions.question: 51. Hasdeo and Korba are major coalfields located in... / हसदेव और कोरबा प्रमुख कोयला क्षेत्र ... में स्थित हैं।
questions.explanation: The Korba coalfield is a significant mining area in Chhattisgarh.

questions.question: 52. Talcher and Ibvalley are prominent coal regions in... / तालचेर और इबवैली ... के प्रमुख कोयला क्षेत्र हैं।
questions.explanation: Talcher is one of the largest coalfields in India, located in Odisha.

questions.question: 53. The Neyvelli coalfields in Tamil Nadu are famous for... / तमिलनाडु में नेवेली कोयला क्षेत्र ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध हैं।
questions.explanation: Neyvelli is the most important center for lignite mining in India.

questions.question: 54. The Raniganj coalfield is located in which state? / रानीगंज कोयला क्षेत्र किस राज्य में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Raniganj is one of India's oldest and most significant coalfields, located in West Bengal.

questions.question: 55. The Damodar Valley region is rich in which type of coal? / दामोदर घाटी क्षेत्र किस प्रकार के कोयले से समृद्ध है?
questions.explanation: The Gondwana coalfields in the Damodar Valley primarily contain bituminous coal.

questions.question: 56. What is the main component of Natural Gas? / प्राकृतिक गैस का मुख्य घटक क्या है?
questions.explanation: Natural gas is primarily composed of methane (CH4).

questions.question: 57. Digboi, one of India's oldest oil fields, is in... / डिगबोई, भारत के सबसे पुराने तेल क्षेत्रों में से एक, ... में है।
questions.explanation: Digboi in Assam is the site of India's first oil well and oldest refinery.

questions.question: 58. The Mumbai High region is known for... / मुंबई हाई क्षेत्र ... के लिए जाना जाता है।
options: Oil & Natural Gases / तेल और प्राकृतिक गैस
Iron Ore Deposits / लौह अयस्क भंडार
questions.explanation: Mumbai High is India's largest offshore oil and gas producing field.

questions.question: 59. Which region is known as the 'Storehouse of minerals' in India? / भारत में किस क्षेत्र को 'खनिजों का भंडार' कहा जाता है?
options: Chhota Nagpur Plateau / छोटा नागपुर का पठार
questions.explanation: The Chhota Nagpur plateau is called this due to its rich, diverse mineral deposits.

questions.question: 60. Which region is also known as the 'Ruhr of India'? / किस क्षेत्र को 'भारत का रूर' भी कहा जाता है?
options: Chhota Nagpur Plateau / छोटा नागपुर का पठार
Damodar Valley / दामोदर घाटी (Often specifically this)
questions.explanation: It's named after the Ruhr Valley in Germany, a major industrial and coal region.

questions.question: 61. Which of the following is the most precious element listed? / निम्नलिखित में से सबसे कीमती तत्व कौन सा है?
questions.explanation: Platinum is listed in the notes as the most precious element.

questions.question: 62. Which of these is NOT a major iron ore region in Odisha? / इनमें से कौन सा ओडिशा का प्रमुख लौह अयस्क क्षेत्र नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Bailadila is a major iron ore mine, but it is located in Chhattisgarh, not Odisha.

questions.question: 63. Which of these is a ferrous metallic mineral? / इनमें से कौन सा लौह धात्विक खनिज है?
questions.explanation: Manganese is classified as a ferrous mineral, used in steelmaking.

questions.question: 64. What type of mineral is Bauxite? / बॉक्साइट किस प्रकार का खनिज है?
questions.explanation: Bauxite is metallic but non-ferrous, as its primary component is aluminium, not iron.

questions.question: 65. Which of these is NOT a coal-producing region in Jharkhand? / इनमें से कौन सा झारखंड का कोयला उत्पादक क्षेत्र नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Korba is a major coalfield located in Chhattisgarh.

questions.question: 66. What type of mineral is Mica? / अभ्रक (Mica) किस प्रकार का खनिज है?
questions.explanation: Mica is a non-metallic mineral, but not a fuel mineral.

questions.question: 67. Which of these states is NOT part of a major iron belt with Maharashtra? / इनमें से कौन सा राज्य महाराष्ट्र के साथ एक प्रमुख लौह अयस्क बेल्ट का हिस्सा नहीं है?
options: (Both Chhattisgarh and Goa are mentioned) / (छत्तीसगढ़ और गोवा दोनों का उल्लेख है)
questions.explanation: The notes list a Durg-Bastar-Chandrapur (Chhattisgarh-Maharashtra) belt and a Maharashtra-Goa belt.

questions.question: 68. Which of these is NOT a type of coal? / इनमें से कौन सा कोयले का प्रकार नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Magnetite is a type of iron ore, not coal.

questions.question: 69. What is the approximate carbon content of Bituminous coal? / बिटुमिनस कोयले में कार्बन की मात्रा लगभग कितनी होती है?
questions.explanation: Bituminous coal is the most common type and has 60-80% carbon content.

questions.question: 70. High moisture and low carbon content is a characteristic of... / उच्च नमी और कम कार्बन सामग्री ... की एक विशेषता है।
questions.explanation: Peat is the lowest grade of coal with high moisture and low carbon.

questions.question: 71. Western offshore regions like Mumbai High are rich in... / मुंबई हाई जैसे पश्चिमी अपतटीय क्षेत्र ... से समृद्ध हैं।
options: Oil & Natural Gases / तेल और प्राकृतिक गैस
Coal and Iron / कोयला और लोहा
Bauxite and Mica / बॉक्साइट और अभ्रक
Gold and Diamond / सोना और हीरा
questions.explanation: India's western offshore fields, including Mumbai High, are major petroleum producers.

questions.question: 72. Where is the Ramgiri Gold Mines located? / रामगिरि सोने की खदानें कहाँ स्थित हैं?
questions.explanation: The Ramgiri mines are a significant gold deposit area in Andhra Pradesh.

questions.question: 73. Identify the INCORRECT pair (State and Iron-ore producing region) from the following. [SSC MTS 2024] / निम्नलिखित में से (राज्य और लौह-अयस्क उत्पादक क्षेत्र) की गलत जोड़ी को पहचानें। [SSC MTS 2024]
options: Madhya Pradesh - Ratnagiri / मध्य प्रदेश - रत्नागिरी
questions.explanation: Ratnagiri is in Maharashtra, not Madhya Pradesh.

questions.question: 74. Which of the following river valleys is NOT known for coal deposits in India? [SSC MTS 2024] / भारत में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी नदी घाटी कोयला भंडार के लिए नहीं जानी जाती है? [SSC MTS 2024]
options: Godavari / गोदावरी (Note: This is based on the SSC answer; Godavari valley *does* have coal)
questions.explanation: Based on the provided PYQ answer. The Damodar, Son, and Mahanadi valleys are major coal regions.

questions.question: 75. Which of the following is NOT an iron-ore producing belt of India? [SSC MTS 2024] / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी भारत की लौह-अयस्क उत्पादक बेल्ट नहीं है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: The Bilaspur-Panipat belt is not a recognized iron-ore belt.

questions.question: 76. Which type of coal is found in Damodar valley? [SSC MTS 2024] / दामोदर घाटी में किस प्रकार का कोयला पाया जाता है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: The Gondwana coal fields of the Damodar valley are primarily Bituminous.

questions.question: 77. For which of the following minerals are Jharia and Raniganj known? [SSC MTS 2024] / झरिया और रानीगंज निम्नलिखित में से किस खनिज के लिए जाने जाते हैं? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Jharia (Jharkhand) and Raniganj (West Bengal) are two of India's most famous coalfields.

questions.question: 78. Mica is which type of mineral? [SSC MTS 2024] / अभ्रक किस प्रकार का खनिज है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Mica is a non-metallic mineral valued for its insulating properties.

questions.question: 79. The Indian Bureau of Mines (IBM) was established in the year: [SSC MTS 2024] / भारतीय खान ब्यूरो (IBM) की स्थापना वर्ष ... में हुई थी: [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: The Indian Bureau of Mines (IBM) was established in 1948.

questions.question: 80. In rat-hole mining, which of the following minerals is mined? [SSC MTS 2024] / रैट-होल माइनिंग में, निम्नलिखित में से किस खनिज का खनन किया जाता है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Rat-hole mining is a (now largely banned) method used for extracting coal in regions like Meghalaya.

questions.question: 81. The non-metallic mineral mica is used in which of the following industries? [SSC MTS 2024] / अधात्विक खनिज अभ्रक का उपयोग निम्नलिखित में से किस उद्योग में किया जाता है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Mica is a an excellent insulator, making it vital for the electrical and electronics industries.

questions.question: 82. In which state are the Gua and Noamundi iron ore mines located? [SSC MTS 2024] / गुआ और नोआमुंडी लौह अयस्क खदानें किस राज्य में स्थित हैं? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: These major iron ore mines are located in the Singhbhum district of Jharkhand.

questions.question: 83. The Panchpatmali mineral deposit region is located in which state? [SSC MTS 2024] / पंचपतमाली खनिज भंडार क्षेत्र निम्नलिखित में से किस राज्य में स्थित है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: The Panchpatmali deposits in Odisha are one of the largest bauxite reserves in India.

questions.question: 84. The Durg-Bastar-Chandrapur iron ore belt lies in which of the following groups of states? [SSC MTS 2024] / दुर्ग-बस्तर-चंद्रपुर लौह अयस्क बेल्ट निम्नलिखित में से किस राज्य समूह में स्थित है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: This iron ore belt extends from Chhattisgarh (Durg, Bastar) to Maharashtra (Chandrapur).

questions.question: 85. Which of the following cities is known as the Steel City in India? [SSC MTS 2024] / निम्नलिखित में से किस शहर को भारत में 'स्टील सिटी' के नाम से जाना जाता है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Jamshedpur, founded by Jamshedji Tata, is famously known as the Steel City.

questions.question: 86. Which of the following is a precious mineral? [SSC MTS 2024] / निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा एक बहुमूल्य खनिज है? [SSC MTS 2024]
questions.explanation: Platinum is a highly valuable precious metal, mentioned as 'most precious' in the notes.

questions.question: 87. Cuddapah (AP) is famous for which two minerals? / कुडप्पा (आंध्र प्रदेश) किन दो खनिजों के लिए प्रसिद्ध है?
options: Gold and Iron / सोना और लोहा
Coal and Bauxite / कोयला और बॉक्साइट
Mica and Copper / अभ्रक और तांबा
Diamond and Lithium / हीरा और लिथियम
questions.explanation: The Cuddapah formations are noted for their gold and iron ore deposits.

questions.question: 88. Which state is the largest producer of copper in India, with its Balaghat mines? / बालाघाट खदानों के साथ कौन सा राज्य भारत में तांबे का सबसे बड़ा उत्पादक है?
questions.explanation: Madhya Pradesh's Balaghat district is the leading producer of copper.

questions.question: 89. Which of these is NOT a major manganese-producing district in Odisha? / इनमें से कौन सा ओडिशा का प्रमुख मैंगनीज-उत्पादक जिला नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Bellari (Bellary) is a major manganese and iron ore district in Karnataka, not Odisha.

questions.question: 90. Koderma in Jharkhand is known as the leading producer of... / झारखंड में कोडरमा ... के अग्रणी उत्पादक के रूप में जाना जाता है।
questions.explanation: Koderma is part of the world-famous Koderma-Gaya-Hazaribagh mica belt.

questions.question: 91. The Malajkhand mine is an open-pit mine for which mineral? / मलाजखंड खदान किस खनिज के लिए एक ओपन-पिट खदान है?
questions.explanation: Located in MP, Malajkhand is a well-known open-pit copper mine.

questions.question: 92. Which mineral's reserve is highest in Chile, but its production is highest in Australia? / किस खनिज का भंडार चिली में सबसे अधिक है, लेकिन उसका उत्पादन ऑस्ट्रेलिया में सबसे अधिक है?
questions.explanation: This demonstrates the difference between reserves (in-ground) and production (extraction).

questions.question: 93. Which type of coal has 40% - 60% carbon content and is also called brown coal? / किस प्रकार के कोयले में 40% - 60% कार्बन होता है और इसे भूरा कोयला भी कहा जाता है?
questions.explanation: Lignite is a low-grade brown coal, with Neyvelli in Tamil Nadu being a major center.

questions.question: 94. Which of these coalfields is located in West Bengal? / इनमें से कौन सा कोयला क्षेत्र पश्चिम बंगाल में स्थित है?
questions.explanation: Raniganj is in West Bengal, Jharia/Bokaro are in Jharkhand, and Talcher is in Odisha.

questions.question: 95. Hasdeo and Korba are major coalfields in which state? / हसदेव और कोरबा किस राज्य के प्रमुख कोयला क्षेत्र हैं?
questions.explanation: Korba and Hasdeo are key coal-producing regions in Chhattisgarh.

questions.question: 96. Which region is known for petroleum, (not coal)? / कौन सा क्षेत्र पेट्रोलियम के लिए जाना जाता है, (कोयले के लिए नहीं)?
questions.explanation: Mumbai High is an offshore oil and gas field; the others are major coal regions.

questions.question: 97. Sundargarh, Mayurbhanj, and Jhar are major regions for... / सुंदरगढ़, मयूरभंज और झार ... के प्रमुख क्षेत्र हैं।
questions.explanation: These districts in Odisha are the heart of India's iron ore production.

questions.question: 98. Which of these is NOT a metallic mineral? / इनमें से कौन सा धात्विक खनिज नहीं है?
questions.explanation: Mica is a non-metallic mineral. Iron, Copper, and Bauxite (Aluminium) are metallic.

questions.question: 99. Balaghat in MP is famous for copper, while Panna in MP is famous for... / मध्य प्रदेश में बालाघाट तांबे के लिए प्रसिद्ध है, जबकि मध्य प्रदेश में पन्ना ... के लिए प्रसिद्ध है।
questions.explanation: MP is unique, having the largest copper production (Balaghat) and only diamond production (Panna).

questions.question: 100. NALCO, with its HQ in Bhubaneswar, is associated with which mineral? / NALCO, जिसका मुख्यालय भुवनेश्वर में है, किस खनिज से संबंधित है?
questions.explanation: NALCO stands for National Aluminium Company, which processes bauxite.
